title: SQLancer alter table add unique gives strange error message
poc: CREATE TABLE another_T (col1 INT, col2 INT, col3 INT, col4 INT, col5 INT, col6 INT, col7 INT, col8 INT);
ALTER TABLE another_t ADD UNIQUE(col8, col1, col6, col3);
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE add UNIQUE constraint on multiple columns
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), value DECIMAL(10,2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test1', 10.50), (2, 'Test2', 20.75), (3, 'Test3', 30.00);
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD UNIQUE (name, value);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (4, 'Test1', 10.50);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table);
